seo.title: Green Salad with Yoghurt Dressing - Marinda Kook

html:
Green salad with yoghurt dressing

Ingredients

  • 1 onion finely sliced
  • 4 spring onions finely sliced
  • One pack mixed salad leaves or just butter lettuce
  • ½ cucumber cut into cubes
  • 1 avo cut into cubes
  • 90 ml toasted sunflower seeds

 

Mix everything together in a nice salad bowl

 

Salad dressing

250 ml Greek yoghurt

2 garlic cloves finely chopped

60 ml fresh lemon juice

30 ml olive oil

5 ml salt

5 ml freshly ground black pepper

100 ml finely chopped dill

 

Method

  • Mix all the ingredients well, except the dill
  • Now stir in the dill
  • Pour over the salad
